sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111736" key="flegmona/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φλεγμον-άομαι</orth>, <sense id="n111736.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">become inflamed,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
